expectations.text: The output includes a structured JSON animation plan
expectations.evidence: output.md contains a full JSON plan with scene, objects, motions, timeline, camera, style, render_settings

expectations.text: The output includes a Blender Python script
The script creates a rocket-like object (cone + cylinder or similar composite)
expectations.evidence: Creates cone nose, cylinder body, inverted cone nozzle, and 4 cube fins — all parented to an Empty

expectations.text: The script includes a ground plane
The script uses particle systems or volumetrics for smoke/fire effects
expectations.evidence: PARTICLE_SYSTEM modifier 'SmokeParticles' with 2000 particles, Newton physics, emitting from face

expectations.text: The script animates the rocket moving upward with keyframes
expectations.evidence: 7 keyframes from Z=0 to Z=120 with Bezier interpolation for acceleration effect

expectations.text: The script includes a camera that tracks or follows the rocket
expectations.evidence: Camera with TRACK_TO constraint targeting rocket_parent, TRACK_NEGATIVE_Z axis
Warm SUN key light, cool blue AREA rim light, orange POINT engine glow parented to rocket
output.md has 'How to Run' section with install + render commands
